notes: Fretboard mode switcher: chips along the top re-anchor the practice window at any degree (G Ionian at fr.3, same notes as A Dorian at fr.5 - roots stay put, the highlighted starting position moves). Plus customization: recolor each scale degree and a new light/dark theme toggle. NOTE: if updating from 0.6.1 or older, uninstall the old app first (new signing key).
